channel.title: Tall Tales Archive
channel.itunes:author: Jason Stewart & Nikki Jagerman
channel.description: The complete audio archive of the Tall Tales podcast (2015-2018). Hosted by Jason Stewart and Nikki Jagerman.

item.title: @negnance
item.itunes:title: @negnance
item.description: Jason and Nikki are joined by Chris Chang aka @negnance.
